title: Fix live_component with duplicate state across parent
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/filter_panel_component.ex (module MyAppWeb.FilterPanelComponent) as a Phoenix.LiveComponent. Critical: it must NOT keep a local :filter copy that drifts from the parent. update/2 always writes the incoming assigns, replacing any previous state. The component's own events are scoped to @myself (phx-target={@myself}), and on change it sends the new value to the parent via send(self(), {:filter_change, new_filter}) — the parent is the source of truth, which will re-invoke update/2 with the new assigns.
tier_rationale: Requires understanding LC update lifecycle and not persisting local state across updates.
